info.title: Teable App
info.description: Manage Data as easy as drink a cup of tea

200.description: Returns data about the plugin context menu.

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request GET \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/plugin-context-menu/%7BpluginInstallId%7D \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/plugin-context-menu/%7BpluginInstallId%7D", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

curl --request DELETE \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/plugin-context-menu/%7BpluginInstallId%7D \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("DELETE", "/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/plugin-context-menu/%7BpluginInstallId%7D", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

curl --request POST \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/plugin-context-menu/install \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"name":"string","pluginId":"string"}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"name\":\"string\",\"pluginId\":\"string\"}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("POST", "/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/plugin-context-menu/install", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

curl --request PUT \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/plugin-context-menu/%7BpluginInstallId%7D/move \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"anchorId":"string","position":"before"}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"anchorId\":\"string\",\"position\":\"before\"}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("PUT", "/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/plugin-context-menu/%7BpluginInstallId%7D/move", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

curl --request PATCH \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/plugin-context-menu/%7BpluginInstallId%7D/rename \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"name":"string"}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"name\":\"string\"}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("PATCH", "/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/plugin-context-menu/%7BpluginInstallId%7D/rename", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

curl --request PUT \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/plugin-context-menu/%7BpluginInstallId%7D/update-storage \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"storage":{"property1":null,"property2":null}}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"storage\":{\"property1\":null,\"property2\":null}}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("PUT", "/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/plugin-context-menu/%7BpluginInstallId%7D/update-storage", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

curl --request GET \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/plugin-context-menu \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/plugin-context-menu", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

200.description: Plugin context menu storage retrieved successfully.
